english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
O Allah, divert my restlessness in the grave into peace.

arabic text: اللهمُ ارَحّمني بِالقُرآن واجَعلهُ ليِ إمَاماً وَنّوراً وَهدىً وُرحمة،
english translation text: O Allah! let me receive Your mercy by means of the Noble Qur’an and make it my guide as well as a source of light, guidance and grace for me.

arabic text: اللُهم ذكِّرني منهُ ما نَسيتّ وعلِّمني منهُ مَا جهِّلت وارزٍّقني تَلاوتهُ آنَاء اللِيل وأَطراّف النهارِ
english translation text: O Allah ! revive my memory of whatever I was made to forget from the Noble Qur’an, grant me understanding of whatever part I know not, enable me to recite it during hours of day and night

arabic text: وَاجعلهُ ليِ حجةً يا ربّ العاَلمين
english translation text: and make it my main argumentative support (in all matters), O Lord of the worlds.
